title: City to Host Open House for Kirk Park Pedestrian Bridge Project
summary: The City of Syracuse Department of Engineering will host a public open house on February 11, 2025 to gather community feedback on the Kirk Park Pedestrian Bridge Project, which will replace an outdated bridge over Onondaga Creek. The project aims to enhance functionality, safety, and connectivity between the Creekwalk and Kirk Park, with public input accepted through February 28.

political_signal.description: City prioritizes infrastructure modernization and community engagement through multi-channel feedback mechanisms (in-person and online).
